audit_items.proof_trace: `_getAssetPrice` (PriceManager.sol:372-419) normalizes all oracle prices to `PRICE_DECIMALS = 18` on both the Data Streams path and the Data Feed fallback path before returning. All three callers of `_getAssetOutAmount` (lines 442, 766, GPV2CompatibleAuction.sol:154) pass this 18-dec price; within the function, `mulDivUp(price_18dec, 10^nativeDecimals)` produces an 18-dec USD value, `mulWadUp(priceMultiplier_1e18)` applies the linearly decayed multiplier (also 1e18-scaled), and `mulDivUp(10^outDecimals, outPrice_18dec)` converts back to native token units — dimensional consistency is maintained throughout. Threshold comparisons (`minAuctionSizeUsd`, `minBidUsdValue`) also use 18-decimal values on both sides, confirmed by the test constant `MIN_AUCTION_SIZE_USD = 1_000e18`.
